Interface Ability

All Known Subinterfaces:
ActiveAbility, PassiveAbility
All Known Implementing Classes:
DoubleHaul, FishersFrenzy, LineMastery, MasterAngler, PatientAngler, SteadyCurrent
public interface Ability
Base contract for a single ability within a skill.

An ability is any perk unlocked as a player levels up a skill. Concrete subtypes determine how it is invoked:

  • ActiveAbility — manually triggered by the player via the sneak-right-click selection GUI.
  • PassiveAbility — automatically dispatched by AbstractSkill.firePassives(PassiveTrigger, Player, UUID) when a matching game event fires.

This interface intentionally contains only the metadata that applies to every ability regardless of type. Use instanceof checks to access type-specific methods.

  • Method Details

    • id

      String id()
      Returns:
      the namespaced identifier, e.g. "fishing:patient-angler"

    • name

      String name()
      Returns:
      the player-facing display name, e.g. "Patient Angler"

    • description

      String description()
      Returns:
      a short player-facing description of what the ability does

    • unlockLevel

      int unlockLevel()
      Returns:
      the skill level at which this ability is unlocked
